scenario.title: The Eligibility Engine
scenario.context: Your loan application system uses AI to evaluate eligibility through a complex decision tree. Different branches require different data collection and evaluation criteria.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that implements a multi-level decision tree with data-dependent branching and different evaluation paths.
constraints: Each branch may require different additional data
scenario.exampleInput: Loan eligibility: First check loan type (personal/mortgage/auto) → then check amount threshold → then evaluate based on type-specific criteria. Personal <$10k has simpler criteria than >$50k mortgage.
hints: Map the decision tree visually first
Specify evaluation criteria at leaf nodes

rubric.name: Decision Tree Structure
rubric.description: Is the decision tree clearly mapped?

scoringGuide.excellent: Multi-level tree with all branches defined

rubric.name: Data Requirements
rubric.description: Are data needs per branch defined?
